allow: Bash(curl -s -L --max-time 15 -H "User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36" "https://mcpmarket.com/tools/skills/coding-agent-orchestrator-1" | sed 's/<script[^>]*>.*<\\/script>//g' | sed 's/<style[^>]*>.*<\\/style>//g' | sed 's/<[^>]*>//g' | sed '/^\\s*$/d' | head -400)
Bash(ls node_modules/exa-js/dist/*.d.ts 2>/dev/null || ls node_modules/exa-js/dist/*.d.mts 2>/dev/null || find node_modules/exa-js -name "*.d.ts" -o -name "*.d.mts" | head -5)
